title: 7 Blue-Chip Stocks to Buy Right Now

title: Why This Analyst Says Dump Credit Card Stocks Now
text: Many analysts believe that a recession is coming, or we are already in it. Evidence of this includes five consecutive weeks of losses for the S&P 500, as well as a drop in gross domestic product of 1.4% for the first quarter.
